<doctag><page_header><loc_44><loc_28><loc_75><loc_35>TLV757P</page_header>
<page_header><loc_44><loc_35><loc_190><loc_40>SBVS322C - OCTOBER 2017 - REVISED MARCH 2024</page_header>
<picture><loc_377><loc_18><loc_456><loc_35></picture>
<page_header><loc_420><loc_35><loc_456><loc_40>www.ti.com</page_header>
<section_header_level_1><loc_46><loc_48><loc_121><loc_57>5 Specifications</section_header_level_1>
<section_header_level_1><loc_46><loc_59><loc_179><loc_67>5.1 Absolute Maximum Ratings</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_46><loc_70><loc_271><loc_76>over operating free-air temperature range (unless otherwise noted) (1)</text>
<otsl><loc_46><loc_76><loc_454><loc_126><ecel><fcel>MIN<fcel>MAX<fcel>UNIT<nl><fcel>Supply voltage,V$_{IN}$<fcel>-0.3<fcel>6.0<fcel>V<nl><fcel>Enable voltage, V$_{EN}$<fcel>-0.3<fcel>6.0<fcel>V<nl><fcel>Output voltage, V$_{OUT}$<fcel>-0.3<fcel>V$_{IN}$ + 0.3 (2)<fcel>V<nl><fcel>Operating junction temperature range, T$_{J}$<fcel>-40<fcel>150<fcel>°C<nl><fcel>Storage temperature, T$_{stg}$<fcel>-65<fcel>150<fcel>°C<nl></otsl>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_46><loc_131><loc_433><loc_155>(1) Stresses beyond those listed under Absolute Maximum Ratings may cause permanent damage to the device. These are stress ratings only, which do not imply functional operation of the device at these or any other conditions beyond those indicated under Recommended Operating Conditions . Exposure to absolute-maximum-rated conditions for extended periods may affect device reliability.</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_155><loc_273><loc_161>(2) The absolute maximum rating is V$_{IN}$ + 0.3V or 6.0V, whichever is smaller</list_item>
</unordered_list>
<section_header_level_1><loc_46><loc_173><loc_115><loc_181>5.2 ESD Ratings</section_header_level_1>
<otsl><loc_46><loc_182><loc_454><loc_206><ecel><fcel>VALUE<fcel>UNIT<nl><fcel>V$_{(ESD)}$<fcel>Human-body model (HBM), per ANSI/ESDA/JEDEC JS-001 (1)<fcel>±1000<nl><ucel><fcel>Charged-device model (CDM), per JEDEC specification JESD22-C101 (2)<fcel>±500<nl></otsl>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_46><loc_211><loc_449><loc_223>(1) JEDEC document JEP155 states that 500V HBM allows safe manufacturing with a standard ESD control process. Manufacturing with less than 500V HBM is possible with the necessary precautions.</list_item>
<list_item><loc_46><loc_223><loc_449><loc_235>(2) JEDEC document JEP157 states that 250V CDM allows safe manufacturing with a standard ESD control process. Manufacturing with less than 250V CDM is possible with the necessary precautions.</list_item>
</unordered_list>
<section_header_level_1><loc_46><loc_247><loc_220><loc_255>5.3 Recommended Operating Conditions</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_46><loc_258><loc_264><loc_264>over operating free-air temperature range (unless otherwise noted)</text>
<otsl><loc_46><loc_264><loc_454><loc_337><ecel><fcel>MIN<fcel>MAX<fcel>UNIT<nl><fcel>V$_{IN}$<fcel>Input voltage<fcel>5.5<fcel>V<nl><fcel>V$_{OUT}$<fcel>Output voltage<fcel>0.6<fcel>V<nl><fcel>V$_{EN}$<fcel>Enable voltage<fcel>0<fcel>5.5<nl><fcel>I$_{OUT}$<fcel>Output current<fcel>0<fcel>1<nl><fcel>C$_{IN}$<fcel>Input capacitor<fcel>1<ecel><nl><fcel>C$_{OUT}$<fcel>Output capacitor<fcel>1<fcel>200<nl><fcel>f$_{EN}$<fcel>Enable toggle frequency<ecel><fcel>10<nl><fcel>T$_{J}$<fcel>Junction temperature<fcel>-40<fcel>125<nl></otsl>
